Mobile is the most constrained context;
what works on mobile usually works on
desktop with breathing room. The reverse
When information has to stack, the order
becomes the design — what comes first is
what the reader sees, and there are no
columns to hide secondary content in.
This piece argues that mobile-first is less
about responsive technique and more about
